title: product-intent
description: Optional product intent record used by the advisory 'intent_ref' field on completion cards. Mirrors the shape of intent_contract for safe V1. Required fields: schema_version, id, product_goal, acceptance_criteria. All other fields are optional but recommended. This schema does NOT gate admission in safe V1.

id.description: Stable identifier (slug, doc path, or ticket id) for this product intent. Referenced from completion cards via the optional top-level intent_ref field.

product_goal.description: Plain-language statement of the intended product outcome.

user_visible_change.description: Whether this intent is intended to produce a user-visible change. An explicit false is a valid non-user-visible declaration.
